---
title: "The Rev. Edwin Ellis Coleridge"
---

## The Rev. Edwin Ellis Coleridge

**Dates:** (1802/3-1870)

### Description

Vicar of Buckerell

### Biography

He married first (1831) Elizabeth Tucker, and, secondly (1841), Ellen Sophia Patteson. He was the son of the Rev. Edward Coleridge (1760/1-1843), Vicar of Buckerell, brother of the poet. He was therefore not related to CMY. [<i>Alumni Oxonienses</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
